name: hardware-product-freedom
description: Claude Code plugin for shipping hardware products end-to-end. Combines industrial design + electronics engineering + manufacturing operations into a single coordinated team. 11 agents (industrial-research, concept, cad-spec, dfm-reviewer, materials, electronics-architect, schematic-pcb-spec, bom-supply, compliance-emc, manufacturing-ops, hardware-orchestrator) plus 10 skills covering enclosure CAD, schematic + PCB specs, BOM with supply-chain risk, FCC/CE/RoHS compliance, contract manufacturer selection, pilot runs, and FAI. Designed to layer on studio. Use the lighter industrial-design-team for non-electronic projects.
